category.name: Crawlability
category.rule: 6 URL(s) point to different domain(s) Items (5/6): - https://aryaintaran.com [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/projects [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/privacy-policy [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/projects/e-commerce [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/projects/task-management-app [host: aryaintaran.com]

category.name: Core SEO
category.rule: Title too long; Title too short Pages (2): /projects, /projects/e-commerce Items (2): - /projects (All Projects | Arya Intaran — Full Stack Developer (65 chars)) - /projects/e-commerce (E-Commerce | Arya Intaran (25 chars))

Description too long Pages (2): /, /?scrollTo=contact Items (2): - / (Hi, I'm Arya Intaran — a Full Stack Developer spec (221 chars)) - /?scrollTo=contact (Hi, I'm Arya Intaran — a Full Stack Developer spec (221 chars))

category.name: Security
category.rule: Page not served over HTTPS Pages (5/7): /, /?scrollTo=contact, /privacy-policy, /projects, /projects/ai-content-generator
CSP allows 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval'

category.name: Content
